Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm The Stay Of The Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEKSANDR A. VOLKOV, Esq. of Volkov Law Firm. Inc. (Tel: 415-987-7000) for plaintiffs;
Atty. JED P. FRIEDLAND, Esq. of Goodman Neuman Hamilton, LLP for defendants SGDM, LLC, Anthony Mak, George Mak, and Henry Mak.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SING CHIN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEES FOR THE SING CHANGE AND BEE CHOO CHIN TRUST DATED MARCH 4, 2005, BEE CHIN's Motion To Confirm The Stay Of The Action Pending Arbitration.

Matter discussed. There being no objection by defense counsel the Court modifies its tentative ruling to take the matter off calendar as moot due to the parties' filed stipulation, and instead signs plaintiffs' "Proposed Order on Plaintiffs' Motion to Confirm the Stay the Action Pending Arbitration."

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Aleksandr Volkov, Esq. (415.987.7000; alex@volf.com) of Volkov Law Firm, Inc. for Plaintiff.
Jason Yang, Esq. (909.861.8813; jason@kennerlawgroup.com) of Kenner Law Group PLC for Defendants.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS ANTHONY MAK, STEVE MAK, SGDM, LLC, HENRY MAK and GEORGE MAK'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Dismiss Or Stay The Action is Taken Under Submission.

Parties to submit a proposed order tracking the tentative ruling verbatim in Word format to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Mary Ann Scanlan, CSR #8875 (415.834.1114; ma@scanlanstone.com), Reported. =(302/RBU)
